title: Multithreaded File Server & Client
description: Thread-pool architecture with bounded queue, hardened TCP/IP I/O, and comprehensive debugging with GDB/Valgrind. Built as part of graduate systems coursework.

title: Distributed File System
description: Write-lock coordination, weakly consistent cache, and inotify-based sync across multiple nodes using gRPC for inter-node communication.

title: CV Insect Detection Pipeline
description: Computer vision pipeline for insect detection using pre-trained models, custom inference pipeline, and fine-tuning for domain-specific accuracy.

title: HAO Brands Backend
description: Production microservices with latency optimization (3s to 0.3s), containerized deployment, and CI/CD pipeline for e-commerce platform.
